_note: CLOB V2 order signing vector, read from py-clob-client-v2 tests/order_utils/test_exchange_order_builder_v2.py (RECON-M5-V2). It is POLY_1271 (signatureType 3) on AMOY (chainId 80002), NOT our POLY_PROXY (1) on mainnet (137) — but signing is the same ECDSA-over-EIP712-hash op, so reproducing the leading 65-byte ECDSA signature validates the V2 struct + domain hashing. The full EXPECTED_POLY_1271_SIGNATURE appends 1271-specific bytes (ends 00ba); we match only the first 65 bytes. Production swaps chainId->137, signatureType->1, verifyingContract per neg_risk.
